name: ČSFD Rating
description: Looks up a movie/series on ČSFD (Czech-Slovak Film Database) by name and year during a metadata refresh and stores its percentage rating as CriticRating, so it shows up in the Jellyfin UI next to the item's title the same way the Rotten Tomatoes rating does. Requires a valid csfd.cz session cookie configured in the plugin's settings, because csfd.cz is protected by the Anubis anti-bot challenge - see the plugin README.
overview: Shows the ČSFD rating (in %) for movies and series.

versions.changelog: Fix: build against Jellyfin.Controller/Jellyfin.Model 10.11.6 to match the target server's ABI exactly. The 1.0.0.0 build (against 10.11.11) caused a NotSupported/TypeLoadException on 10.11.6 servers due to a binary incompatibility between patch versions.

Initial release: ČSFD rating lookup for movies and series via CriticRating. Note: this build targeted Jellyfin.Controller/Jellyfin.Model 10.11.11 and causes a NotSupported/TypeLoadException on 10.11.6 servers - use 1.0.0.1 instead.
